nasb.text: Thus you shall do to all the cities that are very far from you, which are not of the cities of these nations nearby.

esv.text: Thus you shall do to all the cities that are very far from you, which are not cities of the nations here.

cnv.text: 離開你很遠的各城，不是屬於這些國民的城，你都要這樣對待他們。

ccb.text: 上述做法只适用于离你们很遥远的城邑，你们附近各族的城邑除外。
